recap: Day 1 (June 25, 2026) introduced Safeeely - an AI-escrow bot for DM deals (social media sales, freelance gigs, crypto) used via Telegram/Discord/WhatsApp/Instagram/Apple bots under a 'safetag' handle - and covered two serious milestone (pay-in-phases) money bugs found and fixed on day one. Day 2 (June 26, 2026) covered a three-layer WhatsApp notification bug hunt: buyers stopped getting told their payment was ready to release, with each fix (a 24h-messaging-window bypass, then a phone-number-format mismatch, then a wrong Supabase count API) uncovering a deeper silent failure underneath the last. Next chapter picks up later June 26/27: a run of frontend payment-modal icon fixes and the start of the admin dashboard expansion.
